questions.subject: Economy
questions.prompt: In the context of the Credit Guarantee Scheme for Exporters (CGSE), which of the following statements is correct regarding its governance and oversight?

options.text: The scheme is overseen by a Management Committee chaired by the Secretary, Department of Commerce.
The oversight body is a Management Committee formed under the chairmanship of the Secretary, Department of Financial Services.
The scheme is directly monitored by the Board of Directors of the Export-Import (EXIM) Bank of India.
The oversight is provided by a joint committee of the RBI and the Ministry of External Affairs.

questions.explanation: The CGSE is managed by the Department of Financial Services (DFS). Its oversight body is a Management Committee specifically formed under the chairmanship of the Secretary, DFS.
questions.takeaway: Export-related credit schemes involving guarantee mechanisms are often housed within the Department of Financial Services (DFS) rather than the Department of Commerce.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Oversight Body: A management Committee formed under the chairmanship of Secretary, DFS.
